data.body:
I volunteer at a food bank.
Every week people come in depressed and on the brink of tears because they can't feed their family and they feel like they've failed.
It makes me furious, because they haven't failed society, society has failed them. And then it gaslit them into thinking it's their fault.

data.body:
Gold-seed is a near-extinct shrub, mostly prized for its medicinal value. It is native to cold seas. Interestingly, it attracts all kinds of insects.
Its bulbs, when chewed, will stop bleeding.
Unfortunately, the demand exceeds the supply.
